members.name: yagoNamespaceFilter
members.comment:
`FilterFn` compatible with `BatchConfig.filter_fn`.
Returns true (accept) when the triple's subject IRI starts with any of
the YAGO/schema.org/RDF namespaces, or the subject is a blank node.
Returns false (skip) for subjects from unrecognised namespaces.

members.name: YagoConfig
members.comment: Manages YagoConfig settings with fixed buffers; encapsulates ownership and invariants.

members.name: YagoIngestor
init
members.signature: fn init(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, config: YagoConfig) -> Self

members.name: ingestSource
members.signature: fn ingestSource(self: *Self, source: []const u8, library: *Library, capability_inference: ?*CapabilityInference) -> IngestStats
members.comment:
Ingest a Turtle source string.
Optionally populate `capability_inference` with the YAGO class hierarchy.

members.name: ingestFile
members.signature: fn ingestFile(self: *Self, path: []const u8, library: *Library, capability_inference: ?*CapabilityInference) -> IngestStats
members.comment:
Ingest a Turtle file at `path`.
Rejects path components containing `..` or null bytes.
File size capped at 100 MB (delegated to BatchIngestor.ingestFile).

members.name: runIngest
members.signature: fn runIngest(self: *Self, library: *Library, source: ?[]const u8, path: ?[]const u8) -> IngestStats

members.name: runDryRun
members.signature: fn runDryRun(self: *Self, source: ?[]const u8, path: ?[]const u8) -> IngestStats
members.comment:
Parse triples without inserting into Library.
Returns stats with triples_processed, triples_filtered populated.

members.name: buildBaselineHierarchy
members.comment: Constructs a baseline hierarchy structure from input data using Zig's capabilities.
